ddls:
CREATE TABLE "solver_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solver setting */,
  "absolute_gap" INTEGER /* The absolute gap setting for the solver */,
  "goal_scaling" INTEGER /* The goal scaling setting for the solver */,
  "level" INTEGER /* The level of the solver setting */,
  "relative_gap" INTEGER /* The relative gap setting for the solver */,
  "relative_goal_slack" INTEGER /* The relative goal slack setting for the solver */,
  "use_absolute_gap" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the absolute gap setting is used */,
  "time_limit" INTEGER /* The time limit for the solver */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the setting */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the setting */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the setting is active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_setting_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solver setting group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the solver setting group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the solver setting group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the group */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the group */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the group is active */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy associated with the group (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_setting_groups_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the strategy */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the strategy is active */,
  "recommended_for" TEXT /* Types of problems the strategy is recommended for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization problem */,
  "problem_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimization problem */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimization problem */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the problem */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solver setting used for the problem */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy used for the problem */,
  "solve_date" TEXT /* Date when the problem was solved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the problem */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the problem */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the problem */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the problem */,
  "problem_type" TEXT /* Type of the optimization problem */,
  "problem_size" TEXT /* Size of the problem */,
  "solve_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of times the problem has been attempted to solve */,
  "last_solve_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last solve attempt */,
  "solve_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the solve process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES solver_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user's manager (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization result */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimization problem solved */,
  "objective_value" REAL /* The objective value achieved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the solve (e.g., Solved, Infeasible) */,
  "solve_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to solve the problem */,
  "solver_output" TEXT /* Output from the solver */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the result */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  "solve_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the solve process */,
  "solve_method" TEXT /* Method used to solve the problem */,
  "solve_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to solve the problem */,
  "solve_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the solve result */,
  "solve_iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations the solver ran */,
  "solve_memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage during the solve process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)
